prompt: A surreal oil painting in the style of Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa, reimagined as a teddy-bear hybrid portrait. The subject sits in the same half-length frontal pose with folded hands, wearing the dark Renaissance dress and soft draped shawl of the original painting, against the classic hazy landscape with winding water, distant mountains, and muted atmospheric perspective. The figure has 2 round fluffy teddy bear ears on top of the head and 2 plush furry paws folded at the bottom, with a warm beige teddy-bear fur chest replacing the visible skin of the neckline and hands. Long dark brown hair falls smoothly over both shoulders. The face area is intentionally left as a flat featureless brown rectangular block, creating an uncanny censored or unfinished effect. Use cracked varnish texture, aged museum-painting patina, smoky sfumato transitions, low-saturation brown and olive tones, soft golden lighting, centered composition, highly detailed fur texture blended into classical portrait brushwork, whimsical yet eerie fine-art parody.
translatedPrompt: 一幅模仿列奥纳多·达·芬奇《蒙娜丽莎》风格的超现实主义油画，将其重新构想为泰迪熊混合肖像。主体保持了原作中半身正面、双手交叠的姿势，身着文艺复兴时期的深色长裙和柔软的披肩，背景是经典的朦胧风景，包含蜿蜒的水流、远山以及柔和的空气透视感。人物头顶长有 2 只圆润蓬松的泰迪熊耳朵，底部交叠着 2 只毛茸茸的爪子，领口和手部原本的皮肤由温暖的米色泰迪熊毛皮取代。深棕色的长发顺滑地垂在双肩。面部区域特意留白为一个平坦且无特征的棕色矩形块，营造出一种诡异的被审查或未完成的效果。采用龟裂的清漆质感、陈旧的博物馆画作光泽、烟雾般的晕涂法（sfumato）过渡、低饱和度的棕色和橄榄色调、柔和的金色光线、居中构图，将高度细腻的毛皮质感与古典肖像笔触完美融合，呈现出一种既怪诞又奇妙的艺术戏仿效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: 泰迪熊版蒙娜丽莎混合体：一幅异想天开的超现实主义艺术戏仿作品，将蒙娜丽莎重塑为泰迪熊混合肖像，适用于模因风格艺术、概念探索或趣味性的古典重构图像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: oil painting]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
